# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest `main` branch of Loop is supported with security updates. 

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Main    | :white_check_mark: |
| Older   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Loop, please do not disclose it publicly. 

Instead, please send an email or contact the repository owner privately. We will review the vulnerability and provide a timeline for a patch.

Please include the following details in your report:
- A description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce the issue.
- Any potential impact on user data or platform stability.

You should expect a response within 48 hours. Thank you for helping keep Loop secure!
